name: Wild Mushroom-Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups diced and peeled Idaho potatoes
2 large shallots, cut into chunks (about 1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a pot with enough water to cover and cook until tender. Drain.
2. Meanwhile, bring salt, sugar, soy sauce, shallots, and 2 cups of water to a boil in a small saucepan. Reduce heat and simmer until 1 cup of liquid remains. Remove mushrooms and shallots; reserve the liquid.
3. Add reserved mushroom liquid, milk, and cream to a food processor or blender with cooked potatoes and chives. Blend until smooth.
4. Chill for 1 hour. Serve garnished with chives.
Yield: 4 servings
